lead: Use the checker after you decide whether the current table should be viewed as normal or reset.

summaryBoxes.label: Base plan
summaryBoxes.value: Check normal and reset on separate lines.

summaryBoxes.label: Note
summaryBoxes.value: Fix the route before reading the result.

factTable: Judge after the route is fixed.

sections.title: How to use
body: This page stays close to the current checker structure.
Select the route first, then compare the result card and the summary box.

sections.title: Memo
body: When the route is not clear, use the safer line.
Avoid a shallow start if the current state is uncertain.
